spec.title: Add advisory guard for title-specific game references

humanSummary.text: Read-only acceptance audit for qd node add-title-reference-guardrail-advisory found no blocking issues. The scanner uses git ls-files, scans filenames and file contents, skips .env paths before filename/content matching, exits zero in report mode, and is not wired into just check. A non-blocking test gap around built-in allowlist entries was repaired before merge; the final main commit passes node tests, advisory report mode, and qd check.
